## CompiledSort interface

Result of compiling a sort.

`comparator` is either `null` (no sort) or a JS function expression of the form `function(a, b) { ... }` suitable for `Array.prototype.sort`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface CompiledSort 
```
